_about: Machine-readable manifest of Concord, NH GIS data sources. Used by the download_*.py scripts. Edit freely: download_external.py and download_osm.py read this file.

external_arcgis.title: NH GRANIT statewide parcel mosaic (verify layer id)
external_arcgis.note: Server occasionally rate-limits. If this 503s/404s, browse https://nhgeodata.unh.edu/nhgeodata/rest/services and confirm the parcel layer id.

external_arcgis.title: USGS NHD areas (wide rivers/wetlands, large scale)
FEMA USA Structures — building footprints WITH height (HEIGHT field, meters)
external_arcgis.note: National layer; bbox clip is essential. Has HEIGHT/H_ADJ_ELEV from LiDAR — extrude for 3D.

external_arcgis.title: Protected/conserved & public lands (USGS PAD-US)
external_arcgis.note: Substitute for NH GRANIT conservation lands (nhgeodata.unh.edu has an expired TLS cert). National PAD-US, includes all NH conserved/public lands.

external_arcgis.title: National Register of Historic Places — points (NPS)
National Register of Historic Places — polygons/districts (NPS)
EPA Superfund National Priorities List sites (FRS SEMS_NPL)
EPA Toxics Release Inventory facilities (FRS TRI)
CDC PLACES health measures — census-tract polygons (wide format)
external_arcgis.note: Tract polygons with health measures as columns. Complements the long-format download_apis.py cdc_places.

external_arcgis.title: National Conservation Easement Database (USGS-hosted)
external_arcgis.note: Easement boundary polygons. NCED no longer actively maintained as of Jan 2025.

external_arcgis.title: FAA Digital Obstacle File (towers/obstructions, height AGL/AMSL)
FCC National Broadband Map — block groups (BDC June 2022)
USDA SSURGO soils — map-unit polygons (MUKEY)
external_arcgis.note: USDA host returns transient HTTP 503 under load — re-run --only ssurgo_soils if it fails. Authoritative SSURGO map units.

portals_manual.name: City of Concord Interactive GIS Viewer
portals_manual.note: Front-end for the gis.concordnh.gov REST server (auto-downloaded by download_concord.py).

portals_manual.name: City of Concord downloadable PDF maps & data for purchase
portals_manual.note: Cartographic PDFs and some datasets sold via City Hall, 41 Green St.

portals_manual.name: Vision Government Solutions (VGSI) assessment database
portals_manual.note: Full property/assessment records (tabular). Scrape per-parcel by PID or join to the city Property layer on MAP-BLOCK-LOT. No bulk GeoJSON API; export via per-record pages or request from the Assessing Dept.

portals_manual.name: NH GRANIT / NH Geodata Portal
portals_manual.note: 100+ statewide layers: parcels, soils (SSURGO), wetlands, conservation/public lands, land cover, hydrography, roads, trails. Download as Shapefile/GeoJSON/KML/GeoTIFF; also WMS/WFS. REST root: https://nhgeodata.unh.edu/nhgeodata/rest/services

portals_manual.name: NH GRANIT classic clearinghouse / free data
portals_manual.note: Town-by-town and statewide bulk shapefile/raster downloads (incl. LiDAR DEM, orthoimagery).

portals_manual.name: NH DES Geodata Portal
portals_manual.note: Environmental layers: wells, contamination/remediation sites, dams, watersheds, wetlands permits.

portals_manual.name: Central NH Regional Planning Commission (CNHRPC)
portals_manual.note: Regional transit routes, traffic counts, trails, Concord Pedestrian Master Plan. Contact ctufts@cnhrpc.org for downloads.

portals_manual.name: NHDOT GIS / public REST
portals_manual.note: State roads, transit, traffic, signals, bridges. REST hosts: maps.dot.nh.gov/arcgis_server/rest/services and gis.dot.nh.gov/arcgis_prd/rest/services

portals_manual.name: US Census data.census.gov / ACS API
portals_manual.note: Demographics/economics joinable to TIGER tracts/blocks/block groups via GEOID.

portals_manual.name: USGS The National Map / 3DEP
portals_manual.note: Elevation (LiDAR/DEM), NHD hydro bulk, NLCD land cover, NAIP imagery for Merrimack County.

portals_manual.name: FEMA Flood Map Service Center
portals_manual.note: Authoritative NFHL flood data downloads (the live layers are auto-downloaded by download_external.py).

portals_manual.name: EPA EJScreen (environmental justice, block group)
portals_manual.note: Block-group EJ indicators. EPA's ArcGIS host (ejscreen.epa.gov/arcgis) was unreachable during verification, so no confirmed REST layer is wired in — download the geodatabase from the EPA site, or join the EJScreen CSV to tiger_block_groups by GEOID.

portals_manual.name: NH E911 / NG911 address & site-structure points
portals_manual.note: Authoritative NH address points (managed by NH Dept. of Safety). Not published as an open queryable feature service — request from NH DESC or NH GRANIT.

portals_manual.name: NHDOT traffic counts (AADT) & crash data
portals_manual.note: AADT lives in NHDOT's TDMS system and crashes in SADES — neither is exposed as a public ArcGIS layer. Use the TDMS reports or request crash extracts from NHDOT Bureau of Highway Design.

portals_manual.name: NH GRANIT native conservation / E911 feature services
portals_manual.note: Native NH conserved-lands layer, BUT nhgeodata.unh.edu currently serves an EXPIRED TLS cert — most HTTP clients reject it. PAD-US (padus_conservation_lands) is the wired-in substitute.

portals_manual.name: Overture Maps — Places (every business / POI)
portals_manual.note: ~60M+ conflated POIs, free & redistributable. Downloaded by download_businesses.py --overture (needs `overturemaps` CLI or `duckdb`). Check current release tag at https://docs.overturemaps.org/release/latest/

portals_manual.name: Foursquare Open Source Places
portals_manual.note: ~100M POIs as Apache-2.0 Parquet. DuckDB one-liner: read_parquet('s3://fsq-os-places-us-east-1/release/.../places/parquet/*') with a bbox filter on the lat/long columns.

api_sources.note: ACS 5-yr tracts -> CSV (join to tiger_tracts). Needs free CENSUS_API_KEY.
FRS facilities (Merrimack) -> CSV, address-only. Spatial points via epa_* ArcGIS layers.
PLACES tract health (long format) -> GeoJSON. Keyless.
NWIS active stream sites + latest flow -> GeoJSON. Keyless.
LEHD LODES8 NH workplace jobs + crosswalk -> .csv.gz. Keyless.
Concord Area Transit GTFS-Flex feed -> zip + stops GeoJSON. Keyless.
AFDC EV chargers (25mi) -> GeoJSON. DEMO_KEY or NREL_API_KEY.
USGS 3DEP DEM/NAIP/LiDAR download URLs for the bbox -> JSON. Keyless (server flaky).
NREL PVWatts solar estimate at city centroid -> JSON. DEMO_KEY.
EPA AirNow current AQI -> GeoJSON. Needs AIRNOW_API_KEY.
PurpleAir sensors in bbox -> GeoJSON. Needs PURPLEAIR_API_KEY.

living_data_apis.note: Active NWS alerts for NH -> GeoJSON. Keyless (api.weather.gov).
Quakes M2+ within 100km since 1900 -> GeoJSON. Keyless.
GBIF species occurrences in bbox -> GeoJSON. Keyless (capped 9k).
iNaturalist observations in bbox -> GeoJSON. Keyless.
Geotagged Wikidata items in bbox via SPARQL -> GeoJSON. Keyless.
Geotagged Wikipedia articles within 10km -> GeoJSON. Keyless.
Air-quality monitor locations in bbox -> GeoJSON. Needs OPENAQ_API_KEY (free).
VIIRS active fire/thermal detections (7d) -> GeoJSON. Needs FIRMS_MAP_KEY (free).
Street-level image points in bbox -> GeoJSON. Needs MAPILLARY_TOKEN (free).

advanced_sources_manual.name: OpenAddresses
advanced_sources_manual.note: Bulk open address points (alternative to locked-down NH E911). Download the NH/US-Northeast run and clip to bbox.

advanced_sources_manual.name: Microsoft / Google Open Buildings
advanced_sources_manual.note: Footprints to cross-check FEMA USA Structures. MS US footprints by state (GeoJSON) or via Planetary Computer STAC; Google Open Buildings covers other regions.

advanced_sources_manual.name: NWS / NWPS river flood gauges (AHPS)
advanced_sources_manual.note: Forecast flood points on the Merrimack. The NWPS API bbox filter was unreliable in testing — query by gauge LID, or use the working usgs_streamgages layer for physical gauges.

advanced_sources_manual.name: NOAA NCEI climate normals / GHCN
advanced_sources_manual.note: Station climate normals & daily records near Concord. Token-free data service; station-point layer.

advanced_sources_manual.name: OpenRouteService isochrones / OSRM
advanced_sources_manual.note: Derive walk/drive-time isochrones from the road network. Free key. Turns roads into accessibility polygons.

advanced_sources_manual.name: Historical maps — Sanborn & USGS topoView
advanced_sources_manual.note: Georeferenced historic USGS topos and Sanborn fire-insurance maps (LoC) for Concord. Raster/image, not vector.

advanced_sources_manual.name: Satellite indices — Microsoft Planetary Computer
advanced_sources_manual.note: NDVI/greenness, nighttime lights (VIIRS), Landsat/Sentinel thermal (urban heat) via STAC. Raster analysis.

advanced_sources_manual.name: GTFS-Realtime (CAT)
advanced_sources_manual.note: Live vehicle positions IF Concord Area Transit publishes an RT feed; static GTFS is handled by download_apis.py cat_gtfs.

advanced_sources_manual.name: OpenCellID cell towers
advanced_sources_manual.note: Crowd-sourced cell-tower locations (free API token). FCC ASR is the regulatory alternative.

school_sources.note: Concord School District (SAU 8) — serves most of the city.
Merrimack Valley School District (SAU 46) — serves Penacook (N. Concord) + Boscawen, Loudon, Salisbury, Webster.

school_sources.source: Census TIGERweb School/MapServer (0 unified, 1 secondary, 2 elementary)

school_sources.note: Pulled by LEAID (full districts) AND regional bbox.
Regional bbox; includes St. Paul's School.
Regional bbox; includes NHTI and UNH Franklin Pierce School of Law.
District + per-school enrollment -> CSV (db tier). API is slow; has retry.

knowledge_sources.source: Wikipedia Category:People from Concord, New Hampshire (+subcats) + Wikidata
knowledge_sources.note: ~148 notable inhabitants with bios -> CSV (db) + centroid pins (map+db).
All structured statements -> JSON + flattened CSV (db).
Concord, Penacook, St. Paul's, NHTI, UNH Law, NH State House, etc. -> history.json (db).

business_layer_sources.note: download_businesses.py — comprehensive Overpass union of shop/office/craft/commercial-amenity/tourism/healthcare/fitness. No deps.
download_businesses.py --overture — densest free redistributable POI set.
Most complete for hours/ratings but API-key + ToS forbids storing/redistributing as a standalone layer — enrichment only.

business_layer_sources.source: NH Secretary of State business registry
business_layer_sources.note: https://quickstart.sos.nh.gov/online/businessinquire — every registered entity (legal name/address/status); not pre-geocoded.
